Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Continued To Apr-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court shall issue and Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause for attorney Yuji Mitani to appear on April 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to explain why sanctions in the amount of $250 should not be imposed for their failure to appear. The status hearing on close of estate is also continued to the same date.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Continued To Apr-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Yuji Mitani, Esq., for Charles Jorgensen, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel reports regarding his failure to appear at the last calling. At conclusion of counsel's testimony, the court does not find good cause for failing to appear at the Jan-23-2024 hearing and orders counsel to pay sanctions in the amount of $250.00.

The status of the estate is discussed. The court reminds counsel that if the estate is not ready to close, the court will expect the filing of a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Apr-23-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Order to Show Cause is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-23-2024 Continued To Feb-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Yuji Mitani (attorney) to appear on February 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him/her for failure to appear. An Order to Appear will be issued to Charles Donald Jorgenson (petitioner) to appear on February 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Chavez. Not reported.
